claims.name: realized_Rmax_below_threshold
claims.detail: (realized R_max=0.3846 < 0.634 (closure threshold at rho_lat=6.55): the Young-ceiling estimate R_sup=1.59 (=> R_max 1.019) was loose by ~2.6x; the direct value closes the endpoint IF the convention is right)

claims.name: survives_moderate_convention_slack
claims.detail: (R_max x1.5 = 0.577 < 0.634: the closure survives a +50% convention slack, but NOT a full factor-2 (0.769 > 0.634) -- so the absolute factor-2/(2pi)^3 convention is the load-bearing residual; this is STRONG EVIDENCE, NOT a certified closure)

claims.name: convolution_converged
claims.detail: (Ghat4 grid-converged to 0.00% -- the SHAPE is rigorous; only the ABSOLUTE normalisation convention is open)

claims.name: no_lift_claimed
claims.detail: (NO SC-SCOPE lift is claimed: the convention factor-2 is load-bearing and unpinned, and the joint is sunset-limited; SC-SCOPE remains a B1 named hypothesis. Strong evidence only.)
